title: Authentic True Account: Osaka Shock Tactics
original_title: 実録外伝 大阪電撃作戦
overview: Amidst Japan's postwar economic boom, yakuza factions in Osaka fight for survival when Japan's largest crime syndicate plans a hostile takeover.
